sql: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, department = #{profile.department}, title = #{profile.title} WHERE id = #{id}
templateSql:
UPDATE users
<set>
    <if test="name != null">
        <if test="name.length() > 0">
            name = #{name},
        </if>
    </if>
    <if test="email != null">
        <if test="email.contains('@')">
            email = #{email},
        </if>
    </if>
    <if test="status != null">
        status = #{status},
    </if>
    <if test="profile != null">
        <if test="profile.department != null">
            department = #{profile.department},
        </if>
        <if test="profile.title != null">
            title = #{profile.title},
        </if>
    </if>
</set>
WHERE id = #{id}
